source_note: UKPDS 64 (Adler 2003) cumulative incidence of clinically-relevant CKD at 10 yr in newly-diagnosed T2DM. USRDS 2023 ADR confirms diabetes as #1 cause of incident ESRD (~38-44%). KDIGO 2024 narrative range 20-30% over 10 yr.

Yau 2012 meta-analysis (35 studies, 22,896 individuals): pooled DR prevalence ~34.6%. UKPDS-50 (Stratton 2001): cumulative incidence of any DR ~50% at 10 yr in T2DM. The 30% rate represents clinically-noted DR rather than screening-detected sub-clinical findings.
